growth_records.medium: Modified anoxic Burk's medium (N-free) + 5 mM Fe(III)-citrate, N2 headspace

up.method: ferrozine assay; nearly all 5 mM Fe(III) reduced to Fe(II) after 7 days
15N2 tracer + IRMS; 140.2±3.4 µM fixed 15N in Fe(III)-amended culture

up.units: 20 g/L provided as C source (consumption rate not reported)

sec.method: acetylene reduction assay; 695.4±37.9 µM with Fe(III) vs 455.5±7.1 µM without

growth_records.cite: Liu, Xiaohan et al. Synergistic interaction between microbial nitrogen fixation and iron reduction in the environment. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf212. [PMC12516963]
growth_records.snippet: After 7 days of K. grimontii N7 incubation, nearly all 5 mM Fe(III) was reduced to Fe(II) in the N2 group... nitrogenase activities (695.4 ± 37.9 µM)... concentration of fixed 15N (140.2 ± 3.4 µM)
growth_records.notes: Environmental diazotrophic Fe(III)-reducing bacterium; rates are VOLUMETRIC (mM or µM), not biomass-normalized (no gDW reported). Fe(III) reduction rate computed = 5 mM / 7 days = 0.714 mM/day = 0.0298 mM/h (nearly-complete reduction of 5 mM). Nitrogenase activity 695.4±37.9 µM ethylene at 3 d (Fig 2A); fixed 15N 140.2±3.4 µM at 3 d (Fig 2B). N2-fixation (vs Ar) raised max Fe(III) reduction rate by 771.3% and OD600 by 200%. Total amino-acid (N-fixing product) ~1.5x higher with Fe(III). No mu/doubling reported.

growth_records.medium: Modified anoxic Burk's medium (N-free) + 5 mM Fe(III)-citrate, Ar headspace (non-N2-fixing control)

up.method: ferrozine assay; only 0.89 mM Fe(II) increase over 7 days

sec.method: acetylene reduction assay; 455.5±7.1 µM without Fe(III)

growth_records.cite: Liu, Xiaohan et al. Synergistic interaction between microbial nitrogen fixation and iron reduction in the environment. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf212. [PMC12516963]
growth_records.snippet: the Ar group exhibited only a minor Fe(II) increase of 0.89 mM, indicating that Fe(III) reduction was negligible in the absence of N2 fixation... fixed 15N (92.6 ± 2.3 µM)
growth_records.notes: Argon control (N2-fixation suppressed) for K. grimontii N7. Fe(III) reduction rate computed = 0.89 mM / 7 days = 0.127 mM/day = 0.0053 mM/h. Volumetric only, no gDW. Nitrogenase 455.5±7.1 µM ethylene, fixed 15N 92.6±2.3 µM (both at ~3 d, no-Fe amendment). Serves as the paired control to the N2+Fe record.
